name: Steve Chabot
subject: Is “A Wall an Immorality”?
body:
Is "A Wall an Immorality"? No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-jy/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-y/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-j/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-t/)
### [Is "A Wall an Immorality"?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-i/)
Last week, Nancy Pelosi, who is once again the most powerful Member of the U.S. House of Representatives, claimed that "a wall is an immorality." Is she right? In my opinion, absolutely not. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-d/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [My Predictions for 2019](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-u/)
Well, it's that time of year again. Time for me to go out on a limb, and predict what's going to happen in the upcoming year. Here goes. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [A Shutdown, Troop Withdrawals, and a Resignation](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-p/)
First of all, I hope you and your loved ones had a very blessed Christmas. As we should always remember at this time of year, there are those in uniform and otherwise serving our nation in remote areas around the globe, who cannot be with their families, and may God keep them contented and protected until they are back home with their loved ones. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-x/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-c/)
### [Another Shutdown?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-q/)
Is the government really going to shut down in a couple days? And if so who's to blame? And will Social Security checks still go out? And will our soldiers facing hostile forces like the Taliban in Afghanistan still get paid? And if it snows, will my street still get cleared? WHAT'S GOING TO HAPPEN? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-a/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-f/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-z/)
### [Google - One Reason Republicans May Have a Harder Time Getting Their Message Out](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-v/)
We had an interesting hearing in the House Judiciary Committee yesterday. The witness at the hearing was the CEO of GOOGLE - one of the most important companies in the world today. The CEO was Sundar Pichai, not necessarily a household name, but a very important mover and shaker nonetheless on the world scene today. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-e/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-s/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-g/)
### [The Return of the Queen](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-w/)
For 60 years, the Delta Queen cruised the rivers of America, giving its passengers a unique experience of what it was like to travel America's waterways back in the 1800's. Then 10 years ago, it all came to a halt, and this beautiful queen was chained to a dock in Chattanooga, Tennessee. How did this happen? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-yd/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-yh/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-yk/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-yu/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-jl/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-jr/)
---|---|---
2300 Montana Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.
[ Like ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-jj/)
[ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-jt/)
[ Forward ](http://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jttdoc-l-ji)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jttdoc-961825B2-kujkulhluu-jd) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jttdoc-kujkulhluu-jh/)

name: Tina Smith
subject: Demand Trump and Senate Republicans end the shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Hundreds of thousands of Americans are counting on us.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d203/c1f7015/61eeae4e/1140c338/2919599447/VEsH/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201901_shutdown?source=rtw_20190110_em") Friend, Right now, more than 800,000 federal employees and low-income government contractors are going without pay due to Donald Trump's government shutdown. With the shutdown now in day 20, Trump is forcing federal workers to choose between paying their bills and putting food on the table. Between refilling prescriptions for chronic illnesses and making mortgage payments. Between childcare costs and paying for basic utilities. Trump is using these public servants as a bargaining chip, holding their pay hostage while he doubles down on his border wall. Trump said last week that he was "very proud" of what he's doing and could keep the shutdown going "months or even years." **This is dangerous and irresponsible, and I 'm calling on Trump and Senate Republicans to end this shutdown immediately. [If you agree we need to get our government up and running again, add your name. Hundreds of thousands of Americans are counting on us, and we need everyone fighting together right now to get them back to work.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d203/c1f7015/61eeae4e/1140c338/2919599447/VEsE/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201901_shutdown?source=rtw_20190110_em")** [Add Your Name](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d203/c1f7015/61eeae4e/1140c338/2919599447/VEsF/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201901_shutdown?source=rtw_20190110_em") This shutdown is affecting millions of Americans, from farmers whose government checks haven't arrived to those unable to visit our country's National Parks. Some of the people being hit hardest are low-wage federal contract workers, including folks who help keep our federal buildings clean and provide security. They're not getting paid and haven't received back pay after previous shutdowns. I'm working on legislation to make sure this time, they get the back pay they deserve. **We must keep the pressure on Trump and Senate Republicans to end this reckless shutdown and stop hurting our families and country.** Last month, Senate Republicans joined Democrats and voted to fund the government without funding Trump's wall. The House passed a similar bill last week -- but now Senate Republicans, under orders from Trump, are refusing to hold a vote. **[Friend, add your name to join me in calling on Trump and Senate Republicans to end the shutdown and send federal employees back to work.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d203/c1f7015/61eeae4e/1140c338/2919599447/VEsC/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/rtw_201901_shutdown?source=rtw_20190110_em")** Thank you for speaking out, Tina
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d203/c1f7015/61eeae4e/1140c339/2919599447/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). With the shutdown now in day 20, Trump is forcing federal workers to choose between paying their bills and putting food on the table. Between refilling prescriptions for chronic illnesses and making mortgage payments. Between childcare costs and paying for basic utilities. Trump is using these public servants as a bargaining chip, holding their pay hostage while he doubles down on his border wall. Trump said last week that he was "very proud" of what he's doing and could keep the shutdown going "months or even years." This is dangerous and irresponsible, and I 'm calling on Trump and Senate Republicans to end this shutdown immediately. "" "" This shutdown is affecting millions of Americans, from farmers whose government checks haven't arrived to those unable to visit our country's National Parks. Some of the people being hit hardest are low-wage federal contract workers, including folks who help keep our federal buildings clean and provide security. They're not getting paid and haven't received back pay after previous shutdowns. I'm working on legislation to make sure this time, they get the back pay they deserve. We must keep the pressure on Trump and Senate Republicans to end this reckless shutdown and stop hurting our families and country. Last month, Senate Republicans joined Democrats and voted to fund the government without funding Trump's wall. The House passed a similar bill last week -- but now Senate Republicans, under orders from Trump, are refusing to hold a vote. "" Thank you for speaking out, Tina

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: more real impacts of the Trump Shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
As the shutdown continues, the consequences get more dire.
|
---

| | | | "Food stamps for millions of Americans become pawn in shutdown fight."
\-- _Politico_ , 1/7/2019

[**Demand Trump & McConnell end the shutdown >>**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdee/4462dc26/88e91002/201ee09c/697253824/VEsH/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e190110m")
---
I was floored when I saw this report Peter. From _Politico_ :
_"As the partial government shutdown extends into its third week, the Department of Agriculture won't say how long it can keep paying out food stamp benefits for the nearly 39 million people who depend on the program each month."_
**Many families may not be able to afford groceries** if this shutdown continues much longer. All because of Donald Trump and the Congressional Republicans too chicken to stand up to him.
The House signed off on a plan with bipartisan Senate support already. All it would take to get our government back up and running is about 30 minutes of Yeas and Nays in the Senate and a signature from the President.
Within an hour or two, we could have the government fully open again -- and nutrition assistance wouldn't be at risk.
[**It's time for Trump and McConnell to re-open the government. Peter, I need you to take action and demand an end to the Trump Shutdown.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdee/4462dc26/88e91002/201ee09c/697253824/VEsE/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e190110m")
More than 800,000 federal workers aren't getting paid. Parks are closed. Museums are closed. Hardworking Americans who just want to go to work and do their jobs are sitting home, frustrated and worried they won't be able to pay their bills.
For 39 million people, the majority of whom are moms and kids who rely on food stamps, this is a potential disaster.
[**Call on McConnell and Trump to do the right thing and end this shutdown. Thank you for your activism, the stakes could not be higher.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdee/4462dc26/88e91002/201ee09c/697253824/VEsF/ "https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/e190110m")
With gratitude,
Sherrod

|
---
[www.sherrodbrown.com](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffdee/4462dc26/88e91002/201ee093/697253824/VEsC/ "https://www.sherrodbrown.com/")
| | Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Universal Health Care. Let's Get It Done.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
His meltdowns won't hinder our progress.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7abba/2f5ea88d/79e29c0a/2cbdc288/584320526/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/support-health-care-in-wa?utm_source=ema_2019-01-10_public-option&source=ema_2019-01-10_public-option&utm_campaign=public-option&utm_medium=ema") Friend, Universal, high-quality health care: That's the future Americans deserve. Right now we can't count on the other Washington to get us there, so I'm going to lead a movement and prove progressive states can get it done. That's why I just announced an innovative new piece of legislation that would provide a public health care option here in Washington. The cost of health care impacts every one of us, but Trump and Congressional Republicans' continuous meltdowns are destabilizing our health care system and driving up our premium costs. I've had enough of it. So we're going to do all that we can to fight for the right of everyone to have access to high-quality health care. That starts with passing my public option legislation. Are you with me? [**Sign on to show that we are ready for a public health care option!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7abba/2f5ea88d/79e29c0a/2cbdc288/584320526/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/support-health-care-in-wa?utm_source=ema_2019-01-10_public-option&source=ema_2019-01-10_public-option&utm_campaign=public-option&utm_medium=ema") We are going to ensure that people in every part of the state have an option for high-quality, affordable coverage. We are going to do for Washingtonians what Trump and his rubber stamp Republicans refuse to do for the nation. With President Obama, Washington was able to make tremendous progress in expanding coverage in our health care system. But now, thanks to Donald Trump, all that progress is at risk. Consumers in 14 counties have only one option for coverage, and our ability to rein in costs has been stymied. To fight back, Washington state must once again lead the way and set an example for how a government takes care of its citizens. Once again, we will choose to proactively combat the damaging and dangerous decisions that are being made in the other Washington. And I'm proud to do it. [**If you agree that all of us should have access to high-quality, affordable health care, sign on to support our public option legislation right now!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7abba/2f5ea88d/79e29c0a/2cbdc288/584320526/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/support-health-care-in-wa?utm_source=ema_2019-01-10_public-option&source=ema_2019-01-10_public-option&utm_campaign=public-option&utm_medium=ema") Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7abba/2f5ea88d/79e29c0a/2cbdc288/584320526/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/support-health-care-in-wa?utm_source=ema_2019-01-10_public-option&source=ema_2019-01-10_public-option&utm_campaign=public-option&utm_medium=ema")
---
